title: SongPlayedEvent
description: Published by Streaming Service when a user plays a song. Consumed by Analytics and Recommendation services.

event_id.description: Unique event identifier (UUID v4). Used as idempotency key. Redis key: analytics:idempotency:{event_id} or rec:idempotency:{event_id}, TTL 24h.

version.description: Schema version. Always 'v1' for this schema.

timestamp.description: ISO8601 UTC timestamp of when the event was generated (e.g. 2026-04-15T08:23:11.452Z).

correlation_id.description: Distributed tracing ID propagated from the originating HTTP request.

user_id.description: Anonymized user identifier (UUID v4). MUST NOT contain PII (no email, name, phone).

song_id.description: UUID of the song that was played.

artist_id.description: UUID of the song's primary artist.

genre_id.description: UUID of the song's primary genre. Used for weight updates in Recommendation Service.

listened_sec.description: Number of seconds the user actually listened to.

duration_percent.description: Percentage of song played (listened_sec / duration_sec * 100). >= 80 triggers play weight increase (+0.3) in Recommendation Service.

context.description: Time-of-day context when recommendation was served. Optional — omit if no context available.

platform.description: Client platform. Currently only 'web' is supported in Phase 1.

audio_quality.description: Audio quality selected by the user. Optional — reserved for future analytics use.
